title: Asukas New Q Plugsuit Discussion
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's New (Q) Plugsuit Discussion             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 02, 2011 12:01 pm SPLIT from here . ~SSD arahij wrote: Newtype CM (Eva 2.0 spoilers) http://youtu.be/fwlg-_Fv1QU

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon May 02, 2011 12:05 pm Asuka goes Guts on us? HELL YEAH

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon May 02, 2011 12:09 pm That new Asuka look is awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Mon May 02, 2011 12:24 pm Aye, love me some pirate Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon May 02, 2011 12:44 pm Ah, Japan. The only country that has ads for magazines.... Also, FUCK YEAH!!! New Asuka looks beast!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 02, 2011 12:49 pm I'm assuming Asuka's new plugsuit is going to be modeled after the "new generation" plugsuits that Mari and Kaworu have (the 2.22 DVD/BD booklet discuss this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=446781#446781 ), but I guess we'll see. This Newtype image could just be somewhat promotional and the final version would be altered in the film, for all we know. (Nice to see Mitsuishi getting some work in. ) Damn I can't wait for the Q News in this~!

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 02, 2011 1:04 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I'm assuming Asuka's new plugsuit is going to be modeled after the "new generation" plugsuits that Mari and Kaworu have (the 2.22 DVD/BD booklet discuss this:

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon May 02, 2011 1:07 pm What's weird is that ribbing is only on the left side of the plugsuit and the right side looks normal. Also some weird bandages or something around her right forearm? Also she has Kaworu's spear just for looks? Shogo-Kun wrote: Ah, Japan. The only country that has ads for magazines....

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 02, 2011 1:16 pm Ornette wrote: What's weird is that ribbing is only on the left side of the plugsuit and the right side looks normal. Also some weird bandages or something around her right forearm? Also she has Kaworu's spear just for looks?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon May 02, 2011 1:35 pm arahij wrote: Newtype CM (Eva 2.0 spoilers) http://youtu.be/fwlg-_Fv1QU

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon May 02, 2011 1:45 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 02, 2011 1:47 pm Somehow when I first looked at that image I didn't realize that they're (well, apparently) going with Shikinami having a wink and a nod to BOTH EoE injuries Soryu received (not just left eye, but her right arm), yet stylized for the plugsuit due to Bardiel'ed. Pretty cool nod (and cool looking), I guess. I think Asuka holding that Mark 06 Spear is just to look cool, similar to how NGE!Rei in promo images is holding the Lance of Longinus (though Rei holding it does fit somewhat thematically with Lilith versus Adam and Eva-00 sticking the Lance into Lilith) .

[]:             Quote Post by Kaname Langley » Mon May 02, 2011 2:07 pm Yes!! I like Shikinami new plugsuit

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Mon May 02, 2011 2:33 pm Well, it's an improvement over the test suit alright, but that's not saying much. :P I'm not sure if this is really supposed to be a new proper plugsuit though. Dunno if it's just for this promo picture or will be featured in the actual movie like this, but it looks an awful lot like it's just "patched" together (in b4 fanwank), with all the tape (seems more fitting than "bandages", especially in the midsection (better seen in fullscreen)) on it, or for example, one leg has the traditional black stripe, the other the test suit's sensor thingy.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 02, 2011 4:14 pm ah! That proved it's Q stuff! Yay, new Material, new Material, finally new material! What does the spoken text in the add say, tough? Still, once again, the trailers lied: No trace of the green stripes at the shoulders, less blue neck elemetns (sadly). The redisigned Eyepatch is cool, tough. The bandage-y elements (There's also some on her waist) make me wonder whether it's the actual suit or an artistic depiction... What would also point towards that is that the right boob-protector sorta resembles the unit 05 suit one - or is it made of parallelograms? Damn, I need a higher resolution pic! She also has the "crotch accent lines" of Mari's pink plugsuit. She has noticeably less body fat down there. The new design of the red/black parts, those incredibly cool blue elements on her legs, and of course the bandage things are unique, tough. She also still has the round wrist pieces of the "NERV Children" in contrast to the bulky ones with two buttons used by the "rogue elements" Mari and Kaworu. I like the color/shine effects on the bandage parts, they look like flowing blood - perfect for Asuka's character! Also, the asymetry is impossibly cool and epic. Still, this and the asymetries are probably due to her injuries. I wonder if she's gonna have scars, that would make her look cool and war-like. Is it me or has she gotten thinner? Also, how sensitive of them to use Asuka as cover since her fans were slightly upset. Also, wasn't Kaworu's lance red? Maybe it's a replica (like the EoE ones who were also black. Since Seele used this lance/had plenty of access to it, it would be plausible for the Rebuild!Replica lances to look like that - Asuka is often portrayed holding replica lances.) Does that mean... teh Harpies battle? Or something similar? I dunno, just speculations. Anyway, I#m not even much an Asuka fan, and even I am impressed by how cool and warrior-like she looks here. If there's a new plugsuit, she'll probably wear it. Looks like we're in for some epic battle! Oh, I so wanna see Asuka do something epic in that epic suit! I love it, I love it! Sorry, green unit 05 suit, but I think I have a new favourite plugsuit now. The "tattered" look just helps the "war like" feel of it. As I said various times, Asuka's personal plot was more advanced than that of the others (Rei is at 23, Shinji at 19, Asuka was in EoE already, it was compressed a lot) so what we're going to see is Asuka "rising from the grave/Asuka in full bloom" (à la EoE battle) in some form. That outfit really makes her look mighthy. The wounds are there and they left scars, but they're mended now, they aren't keeping her from kicking ass... or well, we'll see. SO COOL! FINALLY NEW STUFF, YAY!

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Mon May 02, 2011 6:49 pm MaskedOmega wrote: You guys really love to talk about Asuka's plugsuit and her eye patch.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Mon May 02, 2011 8:21 pm Asuka looks pissed and sad. And absolutely ready to kick ass. What is she doing with the LoL, I wonder, though?

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon May 02, 2011 8:52 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon May 02, 2011 8:54 pm Not only is the plugsuit a weird, asymmetrical hybrid, the top of the collar looks like it has four white teeth, or Eva-03's head with four white eyes sticking up. Pretty darn creepy, that plugsuit...

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Mon May 02, 2011 8:59 pm ...
